paper_title: CM3: A Causal Masked Multimodal Model of the Internet

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces a causally masked objective that enables full generative modeling with optional bidirectional context during masking, allowing for richer structural reasoning in multimodal document generation
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Close to a terabyte of multi-modal simplified HTML data from Common Crawl News (CC-NEWS) and English Wikipedia
raw_extraction.application: Zero-shot image generation, image captioning, unconditional and conditional image filling, entity disambiguation, entity linking, summarization
raw_extraction.research_problem: Multimodal document-structured generative modeling and zero-shot cross-modal task transfer
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuning for entity linking, entity disambiguation, and summarization
raw_extraction.extension: The causally masked objective selectively masks long token spans and generates them at the end of the sequence, enabling bidirectional context control during generation while maintaining left-to-right decoding
